title: M18 Deeper Canonical Quality And Provider Degradation

items.title: Canonical source exposes deeper quality checks
items.description: The Tushare-backed canonical snapshot now reports adj_factor coverage, limit-price validation, and suspension consistency checks through shadow_validation canonical checks.

items.title: Price series preserve adj_factor across rebuilds
items.description: price_series_daily now carries forward the latest known adj_factor when the current source snapshot lacks an override, instead of resetting historical rows to 1.0.

items.title: Provider degradation is explicit and alert-backed
items.description: Live sync reports akshare upstream connectivity degradation and baostock adj_factor semantic mismatch, and isolated runtime alerts capture the degraded provider signals.

items.title: Repo gates remain green after deeper validation
items.description: Default smoke and harness document checks still pass after extending canonical checks and runtime-local alerts.
